title: Spring dependency not injected
symptom: NullPointerException when calling service method.

title: Controller returns view instead of JSON
symptom: Endpoint returns a view name instead of JSON data.

title: Private transactional method ignored
symptom: Database changes are not rolled back even though @Transactional is present.

title: String comparison bug
symptom: Expected true for new String("ADMIN"), got false.

title: Trim result ignored
symptom: Username still contains leading spaces after cleanup.

title: Unsafe equals call
symptom: NullPointerException when status is null.

title: Off-by-one loop error
symptom: Last element of array is never processed.

title: Reverse loop skips index zero
symptom: First character is missing from the reversed output.

title: Loop variable never changes
symptom: Method never finishes for positive input.

title: Concurrent modification exception
symptom: Throws ConcurrentModificationException when removing items.

title: List set used before add
symptom: IndexOutOfBoundsException on an empty list.
code:
List<String> names = new ArrayList<>();
names.set(0, "Reny");

title: Map count reset each time
symptom: Word counts never go above 1.

title: Missing null check
symptom: NullPointerException when input is null.

title: Nested property access without guard
symptom: NullPointerException when user or address is missing.

title: Auto-unboxing null Integer
symptom: NullPointerException when score is not set.
code:
Integer score = null;
int finalScore = score;

title: Stream not executed
symptom: Nothing happens even though filter is defined.
code:
list.stream()
    .filter(x -> x > 10);

title: Map creates stream of lengths but never collects
symptom: Method returns the original list instead of name lengths.

title: Wrong filter condition
symptom: Adults are filtered out and minors remain.

title: Race condition increment
symptom: Final count is inconsistent when using multiple threads.

title: Stop flag never seen
symptom: Worker thread sometimes never stops.

title: Shared ArrayList accessed by many threads
symptom: Random failures and inconsistent list size under load.

title: Exception swallowed silently
symptom: Failures disappear and debugging is impossible.

title: Catch blocks in wrong order
symptom: Code does not compile because specific catch is unreachable.

title: Return in finally overrides result
symptom: Method always returns false even when try block returns true.

title: Optional get without check
symptom: NoSuchElementException when the Optional is empty.
code:
Optional<User> user = findUser(id);
return user.get().getName();

title: Optional.of used with nullable value
symptom: NullPointerException when email is null.
code: return Optional.of(user.getEmail());

title: orElse eager computation surprise
symptom: Fallback method runs even when value is present.
code: return findNickname(user).orElse(loadNicknameFromDatabase(user));

title: Month value off by one
symptom: Expected January but date shows February.
code:
Calendar calendar = Calendar.getInstance();
calendar.set(2026, 1, 15);

title: LocalDateTime used for time-zone specific moment
symptom: Meeting times shift incorrectly across regions.
code:
LocalDateTime meeting = LocalDateTime.now();
sendToClient(meeting.toString());

title: Using 24-hour format incorrectly
symptom: 13:00 prints as 01:00 without AM/PM context.
code: DateTimeFormatter formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("hh:mm");

title: Array index out of bounds
symptom: ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException on the last iteration.

title: Default values mistaken for real data
symptom: Sum includes unexpected zeros from an unfilled array.
code:
int[] scores = new int[5];
return Arrays.stream(scores).sum();

title: Array copied by reference
symptom: Changing one array also changes the other.

title: Mutable internal state exposed
symptom: Callers can change internal application state unexpectedly.

title: Method returns null instead of empty list
symptom: Consumers must add extra null checks and sometimes crash.

title: Boolean parameter makes method confusing
symptom: Call sites are hard to read and easy to misuse.

title: Recursive factorial never reaches base case
symptom: StackOverflowError when factorial is called with positive numbers.

title: Recursive binary search misses valid target
symptom: Method returns -1 even when the target exists at the high index.

title: Two-pointer loop can run forever
symptom: Loop never terminates for some sorted arrays.

title: Palindrome check compares wrong characters
symptom: Valid palindromes are rejected.

title: Sliding window size grows without shrinking
symptom: Window-based max length is too large for repeated characters.

title: Window sum never removes left value
symptom: Average of fixed-size window keeps increasing incorrectly.

title: Two Sum stores value instead of index
symptom: Returns incorrect pair positions for valid input.

title: ContainsKey checked against wrong variable
symptom: Duplicate detection always misses repeats.

title: Frequency map increments null count
symptom: NullPointerException on first occurrence of a key.

title: Binary search midpoint overflow risk
symptom: Fails for very large input ranges.
code: int mid = (left + right) / 2;

title: Binary search boundaries update incorrectly
symptom: Search loops forever when target is absent.

title: Comparator subtraction can overflow
symptom: Sort order is wrong for very large integers.
code: numbers.sort((a, b) -> a - b);

title: Comparator reverses intended order
symptom: List is sorted descending when ascending was expected.
code: users.sort((a, b) -> b.getAge().compareTo(a.getAge()));

title: Linked list traversal skips head node
symptom: Returned values are missing the first node.

title: Fast pointer null check incomplete
symptom: NullPointerException when checking short lists for cycles.

title: Tree DFS ignores right subtree
symptom: Traversal result is missing all right-side nodes.

title: BST validation checks only direct children
symptom: Invalid BSTs pass validation when deeper descendants break the rules.

title: Visited set marked too late in BFS
symptom: Queue grows with duplicates and traversal repeats nodes.

title: DFS visited check missing before recursion
symptom: Cycle in graph causes infinite recursion.

title: DP array initialized with wrong base case
symptom: Climbing stairs returns 1 for n = 2 instead of 2.

title: Memoization result never stored
symptom: Recursive solution times out despite a memo map being present.

title: Backtracking forgets to undo choice
symptom: Generated combinations contain extra values from previous paths.

title: Bracket matcher pops empty stack
symptom: EmptyStackException for input that starts with a closing bracket.

title: Queue implemented with remove instead of poll
symptom: NoSuchElementException when queue is empty.
code: String next = queue.remove();

title: Greedy interval logic compares wrong endpoint
symptom: Overlapping intervals are counted as non-overlapping.

title: Integer division loses precision
symptom: Average returns 2.0 instead of 2.5.
code: double average = sum / count;

title: Modulo logic fails for negative numbers
symptom: Circular index becomes negative and crashes array access.
code: int nextIndex = (currentIndex - 1) % items.length;

title: equals overridden without hashCode
symptom: HashSet contains duplicate logical objects.

title: Subclass method never overrides parent
symptom: Parent implementation runs unexpectedly.

title: ResultSet cursor never advanced
symptom: SQLException when reading query results.
code:
ResultSet rs = statement.executeQuery(query);
String name = rs.getString("name");

title: Prepared statement parameters set in wrong order
symptom: Query returns no rows even for valid inputs.
